channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: America's AI Rush: Congressional Commission Urges "Manhattan Project-like" Initiative to Outpace China
item.description: A US congressional commission has called for a massive investment in artificial intelligence development, urging Congress to grant the executive branch sweeping contracting authority to fund advancements in AI and cloud computing.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
